title: Smooth Concrete
description: Not only does this mod make concrete absolutely ~fabulous~, it also makes the concrete process way easier!
body:
![smooth concrete title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fe7d9afb0bf399ee3e28c23bcd2364349f9fcff.png)

![Default Concrete](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86b577820ea197eed23d4d06f31ee451c5adb551_0.webp)

This mod changes the default concrete textures to be less grainy and more smooth looking. It also adds an easier way to make concrete - instead of having to place concrete powder in water. Now you can simply make concrete goo! This magical substance only needs dye to become slightly liquid~ Just heat it a bit in your furnace, and you have yourself a nice block of butter smooth concrete.

**Why this mod will save your virtual life**

- No more concrete powder related accidents
- No more grains to hurt your eyes
- No more having to fight a horde of mobs in the middle of the night because you're missing 1 piece of sand/gravel
- No more exessive breaking of iron pickaxes 


![living room example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f939beb52db02c4cd9d281cc34fbe92a67353cf7.png)



<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>

All recipes are shapeless* 

- **Blocks:**

Blocks are made from putting goo in a furnace

- **Goo:**

  1 x Gravel 
  
  1 x Sand
  
  1 x Dye (Any default dye / custom dye)

- **Custom Dye:**

**Antique Pewter**
    
      1 x gray dye
      
      1 x brown dye
      
      2 x white dye


**Baby Blue**

      2 x light blue dye
      
      1 x white dye


**Birch**

      3 x yellow dye

      1 x brown dye


**Blue Angel**

      1 x light blue dye
      
      1 x white dye


**Blue Ivy**

      2 x cyan dye
      
      1 x white dye


**Blue Koi**

      3 x cyan dye
      
      1 x white dye


**Blue Nova**

      2 x blue dye
      
      1 x white dye


**Dark Oak**

      2 x brown dye

      1 x black dye


**Dusty Pink**

      1 x gray dye
      
      1 x red dye
      
      1 x white dye


**Dusty Rose**

      1 x gray dye
      
      2 x red dye


**Gale Force**

      2 x cyan dye
      
      1 x gray dye


**Honeydew**

      3 x white dye
      
      1 x yellow dye


**Ice Blue**

      2 x white dye
      
      1 x light blue dye


**Jungle**

      1 x orange dye

      1 x brown dye


**Misty Rose**
  
      3 x whitee dye
      
      1 x red dye


**Oak**

      2 x yellow dye

      1 x brown dye

      
**Pastel Pink**
  
      1 x red dye
      
      1 x white dye


**Pristine**
    
      3 x white dye
      
      1 x orange dye 


**Rose**
    
      2 x red dye
      
      1 x white dye


**Spruce**

      3 x brown dye

      1 x black dye


**Teacup**
    
      2 x white dye 
      
      1 x pink dye
      
      1 x orange dye 


**Topaz**
    
      1 x orange dye
      
      1 x brown dye


**Upward Blue**
  
      3 x white dye

      1 x light blue dye

</details>



**Other Features**

- Default concrete is more saturated
- Custom colors
- Make concrete in a furnace while you tend to more important stuff

**Future Updates**

- Even more custom colors
- The ability to throw goo at other players x)

## Vanilla friendly colors~

![Wooden colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e1190b910b45840330e01a901987c34719b55f7_0.webp)
